name: sidereal-blade-mcp
title: Sidereal Vault
description: Obsidian vault operations via Swift MCP — read, write, search, properties, graph analysis, lens semantic tools
author: groupthink-dev

setup.help_text: No credentials required. Sidereal Blade connects directly to your local Obsidian vault via the filesystem. Ensure the vault path is configured in Sidereal settings.

notes: Vault tools from sidereal-blade (29 tools) + lens tools from sidereal-lens (11 tools). Both map to the vault service via the vault-v1 contract.
